The '''V-200 ion cannon''' was a weapon manufactured by [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] and used by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] during the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire's]] [[Operation Shadow Hand]].

==History==
These heavy [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannons]] were supposedly strong enough to break through any [[Deflector shield/Legends|shielding]] known to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Unfortunately, during the defense of [[Nespis VIII]]'s space city, the guns failed to penetrate the shielding of a [[Particle disintegrator warhead|missile shot]] from the [[Galaxy Gun]].

==Appearances==
*[[Empire's End (audio drama)|''Empire's End'' audio drama]] {{1st}}
*[[Empire's End 1|''Empire's End'' 1]]
